reviews.comment:
la  atención de los empleadores muy buena.pero la  parte edilicia deja mucho que desear.casi no  hay lugar para estacionar.y el edificio es muy muy viejo y totalmente descuidado

(Translated by Google)
The attention from the employers is very good, but the building leaves much to be desired. There's almost no parking, and the building is very, very old and completely neglected.
